feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Maintenance Order - System Status released CDS
entry.content:
Hello dear community,

please, does anyone know the name of the CDS where I can find this information of a Maintenance Order?

I am looking for a released CDS view (S4H Cloud Public Edition), therefore I cannot use just a random CDS or a BAPI or a table name. It will be used in a RAP Application.

Thank you in advance,

Matus

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: how to default cost center to a FS item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to default Cost center to a FS item in group reporting 

Regards,

Inthiyaz Shaik

entry.title: Bill of exchange payment request print out in France (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello,

in France (and as far as I know also in Spain and Italy) specific type of bill of exchange is used to collect incoming payments (LCR/Lettre de change classique). It's a special bills of exchange receivable that requires printing BoE paper by us (seller), instead of customer. This bill is then sent to the customer and must be returned signed by him.

For that purpose new payment method with special G/L BoE indicator = 'R' was created in SSCUI = 101972

Set Up Payment Methods for Each Country/Region for Payment Transactions). This method works fine and after successful payment run a noted item with special G/L =R is created.
Unfortunately, I don't see anywhere in the system or in the S4HC documentation any option to generate a BoE request printout. The ‘Bill of Exchange’ step in ‘Output parameter determination’ refers to the BoE presentation, rather than sending the document to the customer for acceptance.

Is there any predefined template for printing BoE request? Is there an option in Public Cloud to print such a document? What application object should be used for assigning print out template?

 

Thank you very much in advance for any support in this matter.

entry.title: MD61(Create PIRs) Planning period Items
entry.content:
Hello Members,

Please tell me about Planning Period Items.

Items "D" and "T" look the same.

Is there any difference in behavior between these two?
How should I use them?

 

I would be grateful if you could help me.
Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Industrial Manufacturing

entry.title: inspection plan is not getting deleted using app Delete Task Lists without Archiving ( CA98 )
entry.content:
Inspection plan have been uploaded wrong for materials which needs to be deleted in mass. For that app Delete Task Lists without Archiving ( CA98 ) option is available which while selecting that material is giving message : 
'No task lists corresponding to selection criteria exist '

 

Why is the error raised?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: What is the different between Multidimension analysis and Multidimension web dynpro report?
entry.content:
Dear Exports

As description in title, can any tell me different between Multidimension analysis and Multidimension web dynpro report? I can see they present different style and format, what is the their different purpose? Also, they use different and exclusive CDS view/query, i also want to know the different between the two type of CDS view/query?

thanks.

entry.title: RITA activation for GB and CZ Country Codes in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

We use SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

We want to activate RITA  - Registration of Indirect Taxation Abroad for first time. Our current scenario is as follows:

1. Tax Code " ZC = Czech 21% output service"  is defined as EU Tax Code in Country GB, Tax Procedure 0TXGB.

2. Invoice will be created in Country GB using above Tax Code ZC (which is a Czech tax code define in GB tax procedure 0TXGB).

3. This tax code ZC will be reported in Country CZ (Czech Republic)  CZ VAT Declaration.

4. Scope Item 5RP is not active in our System.

5. Country GB assigned to Company Code 5110 and Country CZ assigned to Company Code 5430.

So could you please help me how to activate RITA? whether it should be activated to Company Code 5110 with countries GB and CZ or to Company Code 5430 with countries GB and CZ?

 

Thank you.

Regards,

Shrinivas

entry.title: Valuation area 002 cannot be the paying valuation area in acctg code 1000Message no. TPM_TRG155
entry.content:
I have faced following error while executing financial transaction through create financial transaction app in cloud public edition:

Valuation area 002 cannot be the paying valuation area in acctg code 1000

Message no. TPM_TRG155

Diagnosis

The valuation area 002 cannot be defined as the paying valuation area in
accounting code 1000. The accounting principle IFRS is assigned for
postings from this valuation area. However, the leading ledger is not
included in this accounting principle.

Procedure

Select a valuation area for payments that posts to the leading ledger.

entry.title: Recalculation of SLED
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if it's possible to prevent the system from calculating or recalculating the SLED (Shelf Life Expiration Date) in the 'Post Goods Movements' app (MIGO).

When posting a goods receipt for a batch, the system is automatically recalculating the SLED, and I would like to understand if there is a way to avoid this behavior.

Any insights or configuration tips would be appreciated.

Thanks and regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: MRP Strategy Group : Gross requirements planning - MTS(11)
entry.content:
Hello Members,
When I run MRP for a material with strategy group 11, don't created Planned Orders.

The item settings are based on this.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/74c0b3a391174482a66a3a23bb28c10d/f722bf53d25ab64ce10000000a174cb4.html

Have you ever encountered a similar issue?
If so, how did you solve it?
Please let me know if you have any idea about missing settings.

I would be grateful if you could help me.
Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Industrial Manufacturing 

#manufac

entry.title: Build Process Automation: Call Web Service with Destination Timeout Error
entry.content:
Hi community,

I am configuring a standard process template "Supplier Invoice Status Check".

https://api.sap.com/package/eu10.storecontentdevacc.automaticsupplierinvoicestatuscheck2/overview

By following the configuration guide, I have created a communication user, communication arrangement, etc. in our S/4HANA Public Cloud tenant. The Destination has been configured as shown below:

I double-checked that this destination is accessible via SAP Business Application Studio.

However, when I test the process, it fails at the first "Call Web Service with Destination" step with the following error:

		{
			"code": "irpa_core.error.Timeout",
			"message": "Timeout error: call callHttpRequest"
		}

The following is the request object passed to the step:

		{
			"url": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartnerAddress?$filter=BusinessPartner eq '15300002'&$format=json&$select=AddressID",
			"method": "GET",
			"responseType": "json",
			"resolveBodyOnly": true,
			"timeout": 30000,
			"encodeDestinationPath": true
		}

The URL is working fine from Postman (with the same user and password used in the destination).

Does anyone have an idea why this timeout error is occurring?

entry.title: Creating Custom Post-processing of the Output Payment File- SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD(ABAP CLOUD)
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are currently implementing custom post-processing logic for the output payment file generation.
However, we're facing an issue when a single payment includes multiple invoices.

The behavior we're experiencing is:

Three separate output files are being generated.

File 1 includes details of only the first invoice.

File 2 includes the first and second invoices.

File 3 includes all three invoices.

Our objective is to generate a single output file that contains all invoices related to the payment.

We have attempted debugging the process, but the BAdI (Business Add-In) we’re using is not getting triggered during this execution, even though the output files are being generated.

Has anyone encountered this issue before or have any insight on:

Why the BAdI might not be triggered?

How we can ensure that all invoice details are captured once in a single output file?

We referred the below link to Creating Custom Post-processing of the Output Payment File:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/exploring-localization-as-a-self-service-with-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/creating-custom-post-processing-of-the-output-payment-file_fa31d25b-c161-4f02-a0b2-b8338533bd94

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Don't want to run CT in few Consolidation Units
entry.content:
Hi Team,

To meet the requirement of currency translation not happening for few consolidation units in SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud Group Reporting, we have created a new Currency Translation method with no sequences in it. Then assigned that Currency Translation Method to those consolidation units for which translation shouldn't happen.

So when we run the Currency Translation task  no translation happened for those consolidation units.

Please confirm is this approach okay as per you.

Also please note - We can't block currency translation task in data monitor as we want currency translation to happen for some consolidation units and no currency translation for some consolidation units in the same data monitor.

It is not possible to block currency translation for few units.

If you are aware about it please let us know how can we block the currency task only for few consolidation units.

Also method S0907 is not working fine on data uploaded via flexible upload.

We want no currency translation to happen for any of the cases-

Flexible Upload

Universal Journal Release

Manual Group Journal Entry 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting

entry.title: DRC France FR_WHT_DAS2 - Occupation field showing no values
entry.content:
Hello team,

The French entities execute report for the suppliers that was paid during the month with a withholding tax code using  DRC France FR_WHT_DAS2. The issue is that they need the APE coding(refer attachment) to be filled in the column “occupation”, which is currently blank.

Need your support to know from where exactly values are getting updated in occupation field in report.

Best Regards,

Sushma

entry.title: TRM - Add Limit Characteristics to assign it to Limit Type
entry.content:
I need to add Limit Characteristic (i.e. Monitoring Unit and Product Type) to assign it to Limit Type.

In Private Cloud we had the option to add it using configuration steps "Analysis and Characteristics Structure", and through "define generated characteristics"

Do we have option to add in public cloud as well as i can't find these configuration activities in public cloud. If we have option, please suggest the path which we can follow to achieve this.

entry.title: How to set Net Price from two decimals in a Purchase Order to four decimal places?
entry.content:
As per the clients requirement, we need to know how to set Net Price from displaying only two Decimals in a Purchase Order to showing four Decimal places?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Update signatory in BIR Form No. 2307 (Run Statutory Reports > PH_WHT_BIR2307)
entry.content:
Hi Team,
How to Update digital signatory in BIR Form No. 2307 (Run Statutory Reports)
kindly do the needful on this Issue.

Regards,
Suvarna.

entry.title: How to exclude incoterms check for service items
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to exclude the 'incoterms' (INCO1) field from the incompleteness check for service items (TAD) on standard orders (OR). For other items it should be maintained, is it possible?

Thank you. Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: No of container not reflecting in recurring inspection
entry.content:
While doing GRN against  purchase order there is option to enter No of containers (ANZGEB) under quantity tab and also while creating manual inspection lot for 09 inspection type under origin tab we again have a field to enter No of containers but when inspection lot is created through job through QA07 and also it is scheduled in background we don't have option to enter no of containers. 

 

Business requirement is what ever value is entered for No of containers for the Batch at the time of 101 goods receipt against purchase order that value should come automatically for No of containers (ANZGEB) against each batch while creating inspection lot through QA07.

entry.title: Balancing field Profit Center in GL line item 0 not filled
entry.content:
Hi Expert

We are facing an error as “Balancing field "Profit Center" in GL line item 0 not filled”, while making down payment to supplier by “Post Outgoing Payment” APP.

The scenario is, we have made a purchase/service order in Plant GF01 and Profit Center GF0101 and then create down payment request with special G/L indicator “A” for the same. After that when we going to post down payment with respective purchase order from different profit center GH0101 which is related to Head Office then system giving the said error.
